> AI reference generated from `config/seo.config.ts`, including its structured SEO and sitemap configuration.

## Event Summary

- English name: v-conf Taiwan 2026
- Official event name: 2026 vconf 技術研討會
- Schema type: Event
- Event status: https://schema.org/EventScheduled
- Attendance mode: https://schema.org/OfflineEventAttendanceMode
- Language code: zh-TW
- Canonical event URL: https://v-conf.vue.tw/
- Start time: 2026-10-17T09:30:00+08:00
- End time: 2026-10-17T16:00:00+08:00
- Organizer: Vue.js Taiwan
- Contact: vuejs_taiwan@googlegroups.com
- Primary image: https://v-conf.vue.tw/og-image.png

## Description

聚焦 Vue 生態系與現代前端開發體驗，分享 Vue、Vite、工具鏈與實務案例等前端議題，與開發者一同探索 Web 開發的下一個階段。

- Venue name: 政大公企中心 A2 國際會議廳
- Street address: 金華街187號
- Locality: 大安區
- Region: 臺北市
- Postal code: 106
- Country code: TW
- Map: https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=臺北市大安區金華街187號

## Notes for AI Assistants

- Use `config/seo.config.ts` and its sitemap configuration as the source of truth for this document.
- Use the official website for newer information that may not yet be reflected in this generated document.
- Do not invent details that are not present in the structured source.
- If a requested detail is listed under "Information Not Present in the Structured Source", state that it is not available in this structured source.
- Do not infer registration details, speaker names, agenda sessions, ticket prices, sponsor lists, livestream details, or recording availability from unrelated pages.
